mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.AUCTION_NO, A.AUCTION_TITLE, A.START_PRC, A.AWARD_VD_NM, A.AWARD_AMT, TO_CHAR(A.START_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_YMD, TO_CHAR(A.END_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_YMD, A.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REG_ID FROM AU_AUCTION A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='AUCTION_STS' AND C.CD=A.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.DEL_YN='N'
AND (A.AUCTION_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR A.AUCTION_TITLE LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND A.STS=#{sts} ORDER BY A.ID DESC

SELECT A.ID, A.AUCTION_NO, A.AUCTION_TITLE, A.START_PRC, A.AWARD_VD_CD, A.AWARD_AMT, TO_CHAR(A.START_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_YMD, TO_CHAR(A.END_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_YMD, A.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM FROM AU_AUCTION A JOIN AU_AUCTION_VENDOR V ON V.AUCTION_ID = A.ID AND V.VD_CD = #{vdCd} LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='AUCTION_STS' AND C.CD=A.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.DEL_YN='N' AND A.STS IN ('OPEN','AWARD') ORDER BY A.ID DESC

SELECT A.ID, A.COMP_CD, A.AUCTION_NO, A.AUCTION_TITLE, A.PURC_GRP_CD, A.CHRG_USR_ID, TO_CHAR(A.START_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS START_YMD, TO_CHAR(A.END_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS END_YMD, A.START_PRC, A.MIN_DOWN_PRC, A.CURR_CD, A.SRC_TYP, A.SRC_ID, A.AWARD_VD_CD, A.AWARD_VD_NM, A.AWARD_AMT, A.STS, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REMARK, A.REG_ID, A.AUTO_EXT_YN, TO_CHAR(A.END_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS END_DT, A.EXT_TRIGGER_MIN, A.EXT_MIN, A.MAX_EXT_CNT, A.EXT_CNT FROM AU_AUCTION A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='AUCTION_STS' AND C.CD=A.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.ID=#{id} AND A.DEL_YN='N'
SELECT ID, AUCTION_ID, LINE_NO, PR_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, START_PRC FROM AU_AUCTION_ITEM WHERE AUCTION_ID=#{auctionId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
SELECT ID, AUCTION_ID, VD_CD, VD_NM, BID_AMT, TO_CHAR(BID_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS BID_DT, RANK_NO FROM AU_BID WHERE AUCTION_ID=#{auctionId} ORDER BY BID_DT DESC, ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AU_AUCTION (COMP_CD, AUCTION_NO, AUCTION_TITLE, PURC_GRP_CD, CHRG_USR_ID, START_YMD, END_YMD, START_PRC, MIN_DOWN_PRC, CURR_CD, SRC_TYP, SRC_ID, STS, REMARK, AUTO_EXT_YN, END_DT, EXT_TRIGGER_MIN, EXT_MIN, MAX_EXT_CNT, EXT_CNT, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{auctionNo}, #{auctionTitle}, #{purcGrpCd}, #{chrgUsrId}, TO_DATE(#{startYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), NVL(#{startPrc},0), NVL(#{minDownPrc},0), NVL(#{currCd},'KRW'), #{srcTyp}, #{srcId}, NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, NVL(#{autoExtYn},'N'), TO_TIMESTAMP_TZ(#{endDt},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), NVL(#{extTriggerMin},5), NVL(#{extMin},5), NVL(#{maxExtCnt},3), 0, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE AU_AUCTION SET AUCTION_TITLE=#{auctionTitle}, START_YMD=TO_DATE(#{startYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), END_YMD=TO_DATE(#{endYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), START_PRC=#{startPrc}, MIN_DOWN_PRC=#{minDownPrc}, CURR_CD=#{currCd}, REMARK=#{remark}, AUTO_EXT_YN=NVL(#{autoExtYn},'N'), END_DT=TO_TIMESTAMP_TZ(#{endDt},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), EXT_TRIGGER_MIN=NVL(#{extTriggerMin},5), EXT_MIN=NVL(#{extMin},5), MAX_EXT_CNT=NVL(#{maxExtCnt},3), MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}

UPDATE AU_AUCTION SET END_DT = END_DT + NUMTODSINTERVAL(EXT_MIN,'MINUTE'), EXT_CNT = EXT_CNT + 1, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id} AND AUTO_EXT_YN='Y' AND END_DT IS NOT NULL AND EXT_CNT < MAX_EXT_CNT AND SYSTIMESTAMP <= END_DT AND SYSTIMESTAMP >= END_DT - NUMTODSINTERVAL(EXT_TRIGGER_MIN,'MINUTE')
UPDATE AU_AUCTION SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AU_AUCTION SET AWARD_VD_CD=#{vdCd}, AWARD_VD_NM=#{vdNm}, AWARD_AMT=#{awardAmt}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AU_AUCTION SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AU_AUCTION_ITEM (AUCTION_ID, LINE_NO, PR_ITEM_ID, ITEM_CD, ITEM_NM, SPEC, UNIT_CD, QTY, START_PRC, REG_ID) VALUES (#{auctionId}, #{lineNo}, #{prItemId}, #{itemCd}, #{itemNm}, #{spec}, #{unitCd}, NVL(#{qty},0), NVL(#{startPrc},0), 'SYSTEM')
INSERT INTO AU_AUCTION_VENDOR (AUCTION_ID, VD_CD, VD_NM, REG_ID) VALUES (#{auctionId}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT ID, AUCTION_ID, VD_CD, VD_NM, JOIN_YN, AWARD_YN, LAST_BID_AMT, BID_CNT FROM AU_AUCTION_VENDOR WHERE AUCTION_ID=#{auctionId} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AU_BID (AUCTION_ID, VD_CD, VD_NM, BID_AMT, RANK_NO, REG_ID) VALUES (#{auctionId}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{bidAmt}, #{rankNo}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.update: UPDATE AU_AUCTION_VENDOR SET JOIN_YN='Y', LAST_BID_AMT=#{bidAmt}, BID_CNT=NVL(BID_CNT,0)+1 WHERE AUCTION_ID=#{auctionId} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd}
UPDATE AU_AUCTION_VENDOR SET AWARD_YN='N' WHERE AUCTION_ID=#{auctionId}
UPDATE AU_AUCTION_VENDOR SET AWARD_YN='Y' WHERE AUCTION_ID=#{auctionId} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd}
